# 新闻速递 2026-05-03

## MercadoLibre
- PKO投资管理公司购入700股MercadoLibre股票，增强其持仓，反映市场信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- PFA养老基金向MercadoLibre投资6492万美元，显著增持，看好其增长潜力。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Sanctuary Advisors LLC持有MercadoLibre价值234万美元股份，反映其投资配置。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiygFBVV95cUxOakxBSVp6U2poUnBTUFIxck1JSkRzMS1CU0E2UmJscGRvVzl6b0JGbXprVWdobm9TbTBiMkZmUlBVdWlIUmI1NUl1dUp6VnQ3ZUQyeG5BbnZYYm9UY2QxTC1kbGxqeHJUa0kwZXdZakFpZHJEdXFzVzZDc0dzc1pfYzNwVTBIdkN0dG9xbDJFOUlGRkNJdTFxWHpyVmRTMjRPdkZBUkxyOGw5UERrRzdjUFdqUmlUNGw4d0ZmLXhhMUQ0S3dEN2JuSmpB?oc=5)）
- 分析师下调MercadoLibre评级并担忧利润，对其盈利前景及估值造成压力。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- 尽管利润承压，BTIG和Jefferies仍看好MercadoLibre，维持积极投资建议。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxOT1FhNkg3c2huZlNyZEtRLXYtRXFLX2UyZV9KU0JNZ2NMazR3d0VBQk9Za3UzLVRHUWNCVWpYMzhSN0FtcG1vU3JyNDBjOENnTTBKdVY0S0R4N0JHbHhhZUZUby16Skh2V2VuTkJ5NWJpUGtSMElUaFBfZ2hfUkc2d1EtdXZQRmp6b0psajM1MHVjVVlLemFYVDNZeXp1cGZUWU9JelZzX0Q?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre获分析师“适度买入”共识评级，表明市场对其前景谨慎乐观。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## Coupang
- Naver推出每月3.4美元无限送货服务，旨在对抗Coupang，加剧电商竞争。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQdTdvR3hfWXF1OGFyRWoyUGZOQkNjYUpyZzJfLVF1Y1B3UXExZ3dOR20zR1J0Rkd3OHN6NE5IN204eDJfZGJyRGJ3UGtXMDBfZEhQeVgyYklGWVk3Z21vU2dXVk16eFFIUS04enpBNzRVSVVxQ3JLRWxSVGRla2pzS0R3dWFsdUtmVWh3dHFtOThLZVBwaFQzaVg0cndhUQ?oc=5)）
- D.A. Davidson & CO.出售Coupang股份，减少持股，或释放看跌信号。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPNFdQMlZGUUR2cW5WblQtZlAxMU1MVE9FZ3kydUItaVlWQ3NFNl9LUmVVSHZLdk1xQlg2RkpJVWYzenZwZFlIemt0ZXZsWVVBaUJvMW42VXdXQkdSV2lkYWxKeklhZTFaWW4ycTFGanhyR2xvb0Nqc0ZhdmNQYTBUZHM5azlYUUpwNi1IdjFUbkJzcU82ZFdiOWNlSHhfdE4tbkdMeVZHcnVMckk?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- Fifth Third Bancorp增持AppLovin股份，显示其对公司未来前景的信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxPZC0xYnVkVDhOUS1ZcFBaM29kQXVndXMzZ2hwbXJxbXNkVnFvM2NNSm5URlc0VkdDVnFWTlkyZExoQ2RpRGxJMXpJTkVvY005NHVibHVIb0QzZ0xXVlZCeDVnd1BQWmZOUXVGZlE2V05kQmNOeVctRVhWN2VHOXktWUh0bnhMMWNFVnBRU0dRUWE5TzcyV1VOZG52UDZsaDQ0QW50WTB6NE5yTDR1NUZvcTNOSHZYbDUzR21jaGVB?oc=5)）
- 文章探讨并批评“员工工程师原型”概念，挑战现有技术人才分类框架。（[Seangoedecke](https://seangoedecke.com/staff-engineer-archetypes/)）
